name: Caraway
summary: It is best framed as an aromatic seed with traditional GI relevance.
description: It is best framed as an aromatic seed with traditional GI relevance.
contraindications: known allergy to Apiaceae family plants such as celery parsley dill or fennel or a history of mugwort-celery-spice syndrome
pregnancy or breastfeeding in amounts beyond normal food use because safety data are lacking
anticoagulant or antihypertensive medication because caraway may have additive blood-thinning or blood-pressure-lowering effects
diabetes medication because caraway may have an additive blood-glucose-lowering effect
dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Aromatic herb/spice forms and essential oils differ greatly and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
typical_dosage: Preparation-specific; use standardized product label for Aromatic herb/spice forms and essential oils differ greatly and require source-backed dosage review before therapeutic claims.
